name: The Ultimate Chocolate Brownie Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C).
2. Cream the Golden Crisco Shortening, granulated sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla extract in a large bowl at low speed of an electric mixer for 1 minute, or until creamy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating lightly after each addition.
4. Combine flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt. Alternately add to the creamed mixture with milk, beating at low speed about 1 minute, or just until blended.
5. Stir in nuts and chocolate chips.
6. Drop dough by heaping spoonfuls (about 2 tablespoons/30 mL for each cookie) onto an ungreased baking sheet. Bake 6 to 9 cookies at a time, leaving about 3 inches (7 cm) between cookies for spreading.
7. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 10 to 12 minutes. Cookies will still appear soft and moist when baked but firm up on cooling. Cool slightly, then remove to a cooling rack. About 3 dozen cookies.
Hint: Smaller cookies can be made using 1 tablespoon (15 mL) of dough for each cookie. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes. Makes about 6 dozen cookies.
